CREATE TABLE intervals (id INT PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL DAY TO HOUR);
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL '3 DAYS 4 HOURS');
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (2, INTERVAL '1 DAY 2 HOURS');
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (3, INTERVAL '0 DAYS 5 HOURS');
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (4, INTERVAL '7 DAYS 0 HOURS');
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_name VARCHAR(100), event_duration INTERVAL DAY TO HOUR);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, 'Conference', INTERVAL '2 DAYS 8 HOURS');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (2, 'Meeting', INTERVAL '1 DAY 3 HOURS');
SELECT id, duration FROM intervals WHERE duration > INTERVAL '2 DAYS';
SELECT event_name FROM events WHERE event_duration < INTERVAL '3 DAYS';
SELECT e.event_name, i.duration FROM events e JOIN intervals i ON e.event_duration = i.duration;
SELECT event_name, event_duration + INTERVAL '1 DAY' AS extended_duration FROM events WHERE event_duration < INTERVAL '3 DAYS';
SELECT id, duration FROM intervals WHERE duration BETWEEN INTERVAL '1 DAY' AND INTERVAL '5 DAYS';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.event_name, (e.event_duration + INTERVAL '2 HOURS') AS adjusted_duration FROM events e WHERE e.event_name LIKE 'C%';
SELECT SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM e.event_duration)) FROM events e WHERE e.event_duration > INTERVAL '1 DAY';
CREATE VIEW long_events AS SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, e.event_duration FROM events e WHERE e.event_duration > INTERVAL '2 DAYS';
SELECT * FROM long_events;
SELECT (i.duration + INTERVAL '1 HOUR') AS new_duration FROM intervals i WHERE i.id = 1;
DELETE FROM intervals WHERE id = 4;
SELECT i.id, e.event_name, (i.duration + e.event_duration) AS total_duration FROM intervals i, events e WHERE i.id = 1 AND e.event_id = 1;
